description: Lock Powered, Controlled Flight to the 1903 Wright Flyer source-backed first successful powered heavier-than-air flight.

checks.reason: The Automobile Prototype node is anchored to the Benz Patent-Motorwagen source-backed 1886 patent/motorcar scope.
The node is anchored to the Wright Flyer's successful powered flight on December 17, 1903.
The Wright Flyer required a lightweight gasoline engine to drive its propellers.
